allow: Bash(python -c "import ast, pathlib; errors = []; [errors.append\(\(f, e\)\) for f in pathlib.Path\('custom_components'\).rglob\('*.py'\) for e in [None] if \(lambda: \(ast.parse\(f.read_text\(encoding='utf-8'\)\), None\)\)\(\)[1] is None or True]; print\('Parsed OK:', len\(list\(pathlib.Path\('custom_components'\).rglob\('*.py'\)\)\), 'files'\)")
